title: Light It Up
description: A small, lightweight Datapack that lets you craft Light Blocks that you can change the brightness of
body:
# Light It Up Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition
Make sure to install the Datapack Version that correctly matches your Minecraft Version or issues may arise.

## 📖 About
This Datapack adds craftable invisible Light Blocks that you can also adjust to any light level you would like.

This is perfect for trying to light up a base without ruining the asethetic of your build with torches or lanterns everywhere. 

## 📝 Features

Stand inside a Light Block and type **/trigger lightLevelAP set #** to change the light level of the block.

Replace **#** with whatever light level you would like the block to become. 

*Keep in mind light levels only go from 0-15*

![gif crafting display](https://i.imgur.com/vOti2Lp.gif)

## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly, the correct file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Issues
Please report any issues to the Discord located in the Links tab, or on the Planet Minecraft page.
